title: Anti-Pull Dog Training Collar - Head Harness for Large Dogs
description: Stop your dog pulling with this humane anti-pull training collar. Features a head collar design with rear-traction hook that gently guides your dog. Perfect for large breeds prone to pulling and excitement during walks.
features: Head collar design - humane anti-pull training

title: LED Double Circular Dog Chest Harness - Rechargeable Night Walk Safety Light
description: Keep your dog visible and safe during nighttime walks with this rechargeable LED dog chest harness. Features a double circular LED design for 360° visibility, USB rechargeable battery, and durable soft materials. Adjustable DIY fit for small, medium, and large dogs.
features: LED double circular design for 360° high visibility
Suitable for small, medium, and large dogs
Durable soft materials for pet comfort
Perfect for nighttime walks and outdoor adventures
